name: WP-W4-billing-credits: preserve top-up credits across tier change + cover billing/quota/idempotency with tests
description: W4 (billing, parallel track under the MMT-ADR-0002 store-delegation boundary) — preserve top-up credits across tier change (no silent loss; escalation metric if a recovery path fires) and add the missing billing/quota/idempotency tests (payer-model coherence). Reads the new subscription/credit model (depends on WP-W1-schema); soft-after IT-W0-patch-billing (WI-551, which owns trial-expiry F-121 — not re-counted here).
acceptanceCriteria: Top-up credits survive a tier change; billing/quota/idempotency paths covered by tests; any silent-recovery path emits a queryable escalation metric. Findings: F-124 (top-up credits stranded on tier change), F-096 (untested billing/quota/idempotency) (2 new); F-121 referenced as already-landed (WI-551), not re-counted. Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W4-billing-credits (commit 23d0c01ad)
riskImpact: S / standard — billing math, orthogonal track.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W4-billing-credits)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan §1 → "WP-W4-billing-credits" @ 23d0c01ad — frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001): WI-614/615.
Bundle rationale
The same billing-correctness surface (top-up credits stranded on tier change + idempotency/quota coverage) under the store-delegation boundary (MMT-ADR-0002).
Strategy
Preserve top-up credits across tier change (no silent loss — escalation metric if a recovery path fires, per repo silent-recovery rule); add the missing billing/quota/idempotency tests (payer-model coherence on the WI-570 subscription/credit model).
Scope
In: F-124 (top-up credits stranded on tier change), F-096 (untested billing/quota/idempotency). Out: trial-expiry (landed in IT-W0-patch-billing / WI-551 — F-121 referenced as already-landed, NOT re-counted).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
Top-up credits survive a tier change.
Billing/quota/idempotency paths covered by tests.
Any silent-recovery path emits a queryable escalation metric.
Risk & blast radius
S / standard — billing math, orthogonal track. Depends on WP-W1-schema (WI-570, Closed); soft-after WI-551 (Closed, Related Items). Parallel to W2/W3.
